description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a large, rectangular array of solar panels mounted on a robust support structure. The panels are elevated above a platform that includes various geometric zones, some of which are marked with text and colored sections, possibly indicating functional or safety areas. The structure appears to be designed for urban environments, with a partially covered area beneath the panels that could serve as a shaded workspace or equipment bay. The mounting frame is constructed from sturdy materials, likely metal, and is anchored to a patterned base that may represent a foundation or integrated utility area. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear demarcations for access and maintenance, and the solar array is positioned to maximize sunlight exposure. The installation is sizable, suggesting it is intended for community-scale or commercial energy generation.
description: A large, elevated solar panel array on a sturdy metal frame, set above a patterned platform with marked zones and access areas. The structure is designed for urban solar energy generation and features a partially covered area beneath the panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped solar panel array, patterned base, and a partially covered area beneath the panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the solar array, the supporting frame, and the distinct colored zones on the platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the solar panels, the geometric layout of the base, and the access pathways.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full width of the array, the support structure, and the arrangement of colored sections on the platform.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 15 degrees, facing away from the front, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted, supported by a metal frame with multiple posts anchored to the base
attribute_array_configuration: single row of large panels forming a continuous rectangular array, approximately 1x6 configuration
